posts.text: A quick public message to address some of the inbound I'm getting from HR technology companies and vendors. I love that you're building an AI product. Truly. I wish you all the success in the world. I understand why you'd reach out to me with requests to demo or advise your company. I'm afraid I'll be declining all of these requests. There are two main reasons: 1️⃣ I have very limited bandwidth outside of my work at the moment. I'm choosing to spend that with my family. 2️⃣ I'm working on several builder initiatives across our talent team. That means it's possible I'll be working with teams building similar tools. Given that, I'm not comfortable meeting with external vendors that could overlap with this work. If you feel I'm ghosting you, this is why. I just wanted to be transparent and share why I won't be taking these calls. I'm still rooting for you. Good luck! ✌️
posts.hook: A quick public message to address some of the inbound I'm getting from HR technology companies and vendors.
posts.name: Lars Schmidt

posts.text: We’re launching Claude Corps, a fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Alongside CodePath and Social Finance, we’ll teach 1,000 people how to use Claude, match them with mission-driven organizations across the US, and pay them to spend a year helping host organizations use AI to advance their missions. https://lnkd.in/eMnyFNz5
